title: Neon
description: A lightweight and extremely optimized modpack for vanilla minecraft
body:
# Neon ```Stable``` ```1.21.1 (LTS)``` ```1.20.1 (old LTS)``` ```1.20.4``` ```Unstable``` ```1.21.4``` ```1.21.5``` ```1.21.8``` ```1.21.11``` ```(Alpha)``` ## About A ```lightweight``` modpack for vanilla minecraft, with some nice tweaks and seriously raised performance. Made to play on vanilla (no mods) servers or you can create your own modpack based on this. ## Open wiki You can edit our modpack wiki! [Do it!](https://codeberg.org/WasteLandOrigin/Neon/wiki) ## Steam deck and controllers compatibility - Using [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) - Controlify comes with a huge range of settings to fine-tune each of your controllers individually, including vibration strength, every single controller input bind (no hardcoding!) and more. ## Perfomance We recommend allocate minimum 3GB of ram for singleplayer game and 1GB for playing on server. And dual core cpu is strongly recommended. ## What exactly does this modpack include? - Automatic screenshot copy - Shulker box tooltip - Immediate mode rendering optimization - Cleaner F3 - Rendering optimization - FPS counter - Steam Deck support (and controllers) - Saturation display - Chunk fade animation - Noise optimization - Fixes GPU-related memory leaks - Fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server - Advanced blur - Entity culling system - Fast language loader - Enhance block entities - Improve the UI and UX for the advancements system - Adds marking system (only if server support this) - Fixes gaps in models - Fixes various Minecraft bugs - Disables telemetry - Adds more advanced online mod configuration screen - Random Generator optimization - Adds Concurrent Chunk Management Engine - Improves the visualization of specific blocks - XP orbs optimization - Advanced configuration for falling leaves effect - Shader pack loader (and some shaders included) - Dynamic crosshair - Enhances inventory management by adding various functions to the mouse buttons - Solves various problems with packets - Adds a customizable (bedrock like) preview of yourself - Minecraft networking stack optimization - Game logic optimization - More detail about armor in Armor bar - Automatic log cleaner - Mod menu - Improves the statistics screen - Allows you to easily type emoji and emoticons in game - Makes chat unreportable - Redstone dust optimization - Little visual improvements by adding a bunch of new particles - Improve footsteps sounds - Memory usage optimizations - Improve server performance at high playercounts - Adds a search bar to the Key-Bindings menu - Adds way to log into your account in game - Render the player skin layer in 3d - Connected textures support ## Mod loader ```This modpack works only on fabric!``` [Go to the official fabric website](https://fabricmc.net) ## Social

## Other ``` Tip: install our icon to install in the launcher (icon.png) Tip: use Aikar´s launch options, they will help you to be more efficient :) Tip: use the latest version of fabric Tip: this modpack will be work better if you using Linux. But MacOS/Windows still compatible Also: We prefer the Foss mods. ```
